title: A1 Beginner
subtitle: A1 general English practice for elementary students

questions.question: I _____ a student.
questions.explanation: We use 'am' with the pronoun 'I'.
questions.explanationZh: 当主语是 I（我）时，be动词要用 am。
questions.coreTakeaway: Always pair 'I' with 'am'. (I 永远和 am 连用。)

questions.question: I eat _____ apple every day.
questions.explanation: We use 'an' before words that start with a vowel sound, like 'apple'.
questions.explanationZh: 在以元音音素开头的单词前，我们使用 an，比如 apple（苹果）。
questions.coreTakeaway: Use 'an' before vowel sounds (a, e, i, o, u). (元音开头的单词前用 an。)

questions.question: A dog says woof. A _____ says meow.
questions.explanation: Cats make a 'meow' sound.
questions.explanationZh: 小猫（cat）的叫声是 meow（喵）。
questions.coreTakeaway: A cat says meow. (猫叫声是 meow。)

questions.question: Bananas are usually ***.
questions.explanation: Bananas are a yellow fruit.
questions.explanationZh: 香蕉通常是黄色的（yellow）。
questions.coreTakeaway: Yellow is the color of bananas and the sun. (yellow 是黄色的意思。)

questions.question: *** is my brother. His name is Tom.
questions.explanation: We use 'He' for a boy or a man.
questions.explanationZh: 指代男孩或男人时，我们用主格代词 He（他）。
questions.coreTakeaway: Use 'He' for boys and 'She' for girls. (男孩用 He，女孩用 She。)

questions.question: I have one dog and two _____.
questions.explanation: For more than one dog, we add an 's' to make it 'dogs'.
questions.explanationZh: 多于一只狗时要用复数形式，在 dog 后面加 s 变成 dogs。
questions.coreTakeaway: Add 's' to make regular nouns plural. (普通名词变复数加 s。)

questions.question: Fish _____ swim in the water.
questions.explanation: 'Can' shows that fish have the ability to swim.
questions.explanationZh: can 表示“能，会”，鱼会在水里游泳。
questions.coreTakeaway: Use 'can' to show what someone or something is able to do. (用 can 表示具备某种能力。)

questions.question: One, two, _____, four, five.
questions.explanation: The number after two is three.
questions.explanationZh: two（二）后面的数字是 three（三）。
questions.coreTakeaway: Learn to spell basic numbers: one, two, three, four, five. (掌握1-5的基础数字拼写。)

questions.question: My sister _____ to play football.
questions.explanation: With 'she/he/it' or singular nouns, add 's' to the verb in the present tense.
questions.explanationZh: 主语 my sister 是第三人称单数，一般现在时中动词 like 要加 s。
questions.coreTakeaway: Add 's' to verbs for he, she, and it. (第三人称单数后的动词要加 s。)

questions.question: Today is Monday. Tomorrow is _____.
questions.explanation: The day after Monday is Tuesday.
questions.explanationZh: Monday（星期一）的下一天是 Tuesday（星期二）。
questions.coreTakeaway: Memorize the days of the week: Monday, Tuesday... (熟记星期名称和顺序。)

questions.question: The cat is sleeping _____ the box.
questions.explanation: We use 'in' to show the cat is inside the box.
questions.explanationZh: in 表示“在...里面”，小猫在盒子里睡觉。
questions.coreTakeaway: 'in' means inside something. (in 表示在某个物体的内部。)

questions.question: I eat milk and bread for _____ in the morning.
questions.explanation: The meal we eat in the morning is called breakfast.
questions.explanationZh: 我们在早晨吃的那顿饭叫 breakfast（早餐）。
questions.coreTakeaway: Breakfast is the morning meal. (breakfast 意思是早餐。)

questions.question: This is a pen. _____ are pens.
questions.explanation: 'These' is the plural form of 'this'.
questions.explanationZh: This（这个）的复数形式是 These（这些）。
questions.coreTakeaway: Use 'this' for one thing, 'these' for many things nearby. (单数用 this，复数用 these。)

questions.question: I see with my _____.
questions.explanation: We use our eyes to look and see things.
questions.explanationZh: 我们用眼睛（eyes）来看东西。
questions.coreTakeaway: Eyes are for seeing. (eyes 意思是眼睛。)

questions.question: She _____ a beautiful dress.
questions.explanation: We use 'has' for 'he', 'she', or 'it'.
questions.explanationZh: 当主语是第三人称单数（如 She）时，表示“拥有”要用 has。
questions.coreTakeaway: I have, you have, but he/she/it HAS. (第三人称单数用 has。)

questions.question: My mother's mother is my ***.
questions.explanation: Your mother's or father's mother is your grandmother.
questions.explanationZh: 妈妈的妈妈（外婆）或者爸爸的妈妈（奶奶）用英语说是 grandmother。
questions.coreTakeaway: A grandmother is the mother of your parents. (grandmother 是祖母或外祖母。)

questions.question: *** old are you?
questions.explanation: We use 'How' in 'How old' to ask about age.
questions.explanationZh: 询问年龄时，固定的疑问词搭配是 How old。
questions.coreTakeaway: 'How old' is used to ask someone's age. (How old 用来询问年龄。)

questions.question: We can make a snowman when it is _____.
questions.explanation: You need snow to make a snowman, so the weather must be snowy.
questions.explanationZh: 做雪人（snowman）需要下雪，所以天气要是 snowy（下雪的）。
questions.coreTakeaway: Snowy means full of snow. (snowy 的意思是下雪的。)

questions.question: There _____ a big tree in the park.
questions.explanation: We use 'is' because 'a big tree' is singular (only one).
questions.explanationZh: 因为后面跟着的 a big tree 是单数，所以用 There is 句型表示“有”。
questions.coreTakeaway: Use 'There is' for one item, 'There are' for many. (单数物品用 There is。)

questions.question: I _____ a good book before I go to sleep.
questions.explanation: The action we do with a book is 'read'.
questions.explanationZh: 看书、读书对应的动词是 read。
questions.coreTakeaway: You read books. (读书用动词 read。)
